hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗高级谈判代表抵达卡塔尔就和平协议进行会谈；【CRYPTO】研究人员标记了针对加密开发环境（包括 Aptos、Sui 和 Solana）的 TrapDoor 恶意软件活动；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Top Iranian Negotiators Arrive in Qatar for Talks on Peace Deal
items.summary: President Trump gave conflicting signals over how much progress had been made in the talks. Both the United States and Iran suggested that a breakthrough was not imminent.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗高级谈判代表抵达卡塔尔就和平协议进行会谈
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统对于谈判取得了多少进展发出了相互矛盾的信号。美国和伊朗均表示不会很快取得突破。

items.title: Researchers flag TrapDoor malware campaign targeting crypto developer environments including Aptos, Sui and Solana
items.summary: The TrapDoor malware campaign used malicious packages across npm, PyPI, and Crates.io to target crypto developer environments.
items.title_zh: 研究人员标记了针对加密开发环境（包括 Aptos、Sui 和 Solana）的 TrapDoor 恶意软件活动
items.summary_zh: TrapDoor 恶意软件活动使用 npm、PyPI 和 Crates.io 中的恶意软件包来攻击加密开发人员环境。

items.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.summary: Warsh could guide to a smaller role in day-to-day markets, while also setting clearer rules for how and when it should intervene.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什真正的美联储“政权更迭”可能发生在华尔街的管道深处
items.summary_zh: 沃什可以引导其在日常市场中发挥较小的作用，同时就如何以及何时进行干预制定更明确的规则。

items.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
items.summary: Companies reiterated plans to growing their prediction markets businesses in recent earnings calls even as a regulatory debate continues.
items.title_zh: 尽管法律环境不明朗，但企业并没有被吓倒在预测市场投资
items.summary_zh: 尽管监管争论仍在继续，但公司在最近的财报电话会议上重申了发展预测市场业务的计划。

items.title: Prediction markets are fueling a high-stakes brawl between states and federal regulators
items.summary: Sixteen states are in legal proceedings against prediction market platforms, while one state has moved to ban them.
items.title_zh: 预测市场正在加剧各州和联邦监管机构之间的高风险争吵
items.summary_zh: 十六个州正在对预测市场平台提起法律诉讼，而一个州已采取行动禁止它们。

items.title: HYPE funds attract millions as investors dump bitcoin and ether ETFs
items.summary: Investors turn to HYPE and XRP funds while dumping bitcoin and ether ETFs.
items.title_zh: 随着投资者抛售比特币和以太币 ETF，HYPE 基金吸引了数百万人
items.summary_zh: 投资者转向 HYPE 和 XRP 基金，同时抛售比特币和以太 ETF。

items.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you
items.summary: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management.
items.title_zh: 比特币期权即将登陆纳斯达克。这对你来说意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 这项新产品正在等待美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 的批准，旨在实现无缝加密货币风险管理的民主化。

items.title: ‘Institutional bid hasn’t disappeared’: Analysts say bitcoin cooldown, spot ETF outflows signal rotation, not exit
items.summary: Bitcoin held below $78,000 as spot ETFs shed over $1 billion for a second straight week and U.S.-Iran deal speculation rattled markets.
items.title_zh: “机构出价并未消失”：分析师称比特币降温、现货 ETF 资金流出信号是轮动，而不是退出
items.summary_zh: 比特币价格维持在 78,000 美元以下，因为现货 ETF 连续第二周损失超过 10 亿美元，而且美国与伊朗交易的猜测扰乱了市场。

items.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 使用 Nemotron-Labs 扩散语言模型实现光速文本生成

items.title: Surge in 'risk-free' treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities
items.summary: Treasury yield surge shows bond market is not 'risk free' after all, but there's opportunity for fixed-income investors in intermediates, BBBs and high yield.
items.title_zh: “无风险”国债收益率飙升促使债券投资者寻找更好的机会
items.summary_zh: 国债收益率飙升表明债券市场毕竟并非“无风险”，但中间品、BBB 和高收益债券的固定收益投资者仍有机会。

items.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
items.summary: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.
items.title_zh: 矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 为爱达荷州黄金、锑项目获得 29 亿美元美国贷款
items.summary_zh: 由于美国希望获得关键矿产，矿业公司 Perpetua Resources 已从美国进出口银行获得 29 亿美元贷款。

items.title: 'Blistering heat': Indians warned to stay indoors as temperatures soar
items.summary: The BBC's Sumedha Pal described how difficult it was to be standing in the streets of Delhi as temperatures rose to 45C .
items.title_zh: “酷热”：气温飙升，印度人被警告待在室内
items.summary_zh: BBC 的 Sumedha Pal 描述了当气温升至 45 摄氏度时站在德里的街道上是多么困难。

items.title: Pope Leo Warns of Risks From A.I. in 42,300-Word Encyclical
items.summary: The document marks a powerful foray by the leader of the Roman Catholic Church into the debate about the misuse or overuse of artificial intelligence.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥警告人工智能带来的风险42,300 字通谕
items.summary_zh: 该文件标志着罗马天主教会领导人对人工智能滥用或过度使用的争论进行了有力的尝试。

items.title: Cubans Cook With Charcoal and Wood Fires to Survive During Energy Crisis
items.summary: The U.S. oil blockade has left millions without cooking gas. In Santiago de Cuba, the cradle of the Cuban revolution, apartment tower residents resort to charcoal and firewood.
items.title_zh: 古巴人在能源危机期间用木炭和木火做饭以求生存
items.summary_zh: 美国的石油封锁导致数百万人没有烹饪用气。在古巴革命的摇篮古巴圣地亚哥，公寓楼的居民依靠木炭和木柴。

items.title: Israel’s President, Isaac Herzog, Denounces Israeli Violence
items.summary: In a speech, Isaac Herzog, whose role is largely ceremonial, delivered a grave indictment of settler attacks in the West Bank and abuse of prisoners.
items.title_zh: 以色列总统艾萨克·赫尔佐格谴责以色列的暴力行为
items.summary_zh: 艾萨克·赫尔佐格（Isaac Herzog）的角色主要是仪式性的，在一次演讲中，他对定居者在西岸的袭击和虐待囚犯的行为提出了严厉的控诉。

items.title: PCE, jobless claims and housing data test Fed cut hopes: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 25.
items.title_zh: PCE、初请失业金人数和住房数据测试美联储削减希望：未来加密货币周
items.summary_zh: 看看从 5 月 25 日开始的一周将会发生什么。

items.title: Crypto and the Fed: State of Crypto
items.summary: This past week saw incremental, but potentially important steps.
items.title_zh: 加密货币和美联储：加密货币的现状
items.summary_zh: 过去的一周出现了渐进但可能重要的步骤。

items.title: Facet co-founder pitches EIP-8182 private transfers for inclusion in Ethereum’s Hegota upgrade
items.summary: Facet's Tom Lehman pitched EIP-8182 for inclusion in Ethereum's Hegota upgrade, aiming to bring native private transfers to the network.
items.title_zh: Facet 联合创始人提议将 EIP-8182 私人转账纳入以太坊 Hegota 升级中
items.summary_zh: Facet 的 Tom Lehman 提议将 EIP-8182 纳入以太坊的 Hegota 升级中，旨在将本地私人转账引入网络。

items.title: NYT investigation alleges CFTC purged staff who questioned Trump-tied crypto firms
items.summary: Two officials who intervened to help three firms win approvals over staff objections, per the NYT, have since taken jobs at MoonPay and Gemini Titan.
items.title_zh: 《纽约时报》调查称 CFTC 清除了质疑与特朗普相关的加密货币公司的员工
items.summary_zh: 据《纽约时报》报道，两名官员因员工反对而出面帮助三家公司获得批准，此后他们已经在 MoonPay 和 Gemini Titan 任职。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will be a ‘smaller ship,’ sell less ETH amid researcher exodus
items.summary: Buterin said the EF is choosing "longevity over breadth," selling less ETH and focusing exclusively on Ethereum's "CROPS" properties.
items.title_zh: Vitalik Buterin 表示以太坊基金会将成为一艘“更小的船”，在研究人员外流期间出售更少的 ETH
items.summary_zh: Buterin 表示，EF 正在选择“长寿而非广度”，减少 ETH 的销售，并专注于以太坊的“CROPS”属性。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore

items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

items.title: Bitcoin, crypto prices tick up as US-Iran peace deal odds climb
items.summary: Iranian negotiators arrived in Doha for talks, focusing on the Strait of Hormuz and highly enriched uranium, as Pakistan and Qatar are mediating.
items.title_zh: 随着美国与伊朗和平协议的可能性上升，比特币和加密货币价格上涨
items.summary_zh: 伊朗谈判代表抵达多哈进行会谈，重点讨论霍尔木兹海峡和高浓缩铀问题，巴基斯坦和卡塔尔正在调解。

items.title: Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will shrink, sell less ETH, and focus on 'CROPS'
items.summary: Buterin's influence in the EF will decrease as the board expands. He framed the EF as "one node, with a defined purpose," not the center of Ethereum.
items.title_zh: Buterin 表示以太坊基金会将缩小规模，减少出售 ETH，并专注于“农作物”
items.summary_zh: 随着董事会的扩大，Buterin 在 EF 中的影响力将会下降。他将 EF 定义为“具有明确目的的一个节点”，而不是以太坊的中心。

items.title: Bitcoin trades above $77,000 as oil's 5% slide pushes Asian equities higher
items.summary: Oil’s 5% drop on potential Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted Asian equities and supported crypto sentiment.
items.title_zh: 油价下跌 5% 推动亚洲股市走高，比特币交易价格突破 77,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡可能重新开放，油价下跌 5%，提振了亚洲股市并支撑了加密货币情绪。

items.title: Tether plans GELT stablecoin launch with support from Georgian government
items.summary: GELT is designed to support cross-border commerce under a Georgian framework aligned with emerging U.S. stablecoin regulations.
items.title_zh: Tether 计划在格鲁吉亚政府的支持下推出 GELT 稳定币
items.summary_zh: GELT 旨在支持符合美国新兴稳定币法规的格鲁吉亚框架下的跨境贸易。

items.title: Satoshi-era bitcoin whale moves over $200 million in BTC to FalconX, Cumberland: Onchain Lens
items.summary: A bitcoin OG transferred about 2,650 BTC to the crypto trading firms through multiple transactions on Sunday, according to Onchain Lens.
items.title_zh: 中本聪时代的比特币鲸鱼将超过 2 亿美元的 BTC 转移到坎伯兰郡的 FalconX：Onchain Lens
items.summary_zh: 据 Onchain Lens 报道，一名比特币 OG 周日通过多笔交易向加密货币交易公司转移了约 2,650 BTC。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.

items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.

items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
items.summary: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.
items.title_zh: 随着与英伟达和苹果的竞争加剧，华为计划于今年秋季推出新的智能手机芯片
items.summary_zh: 中国电信巨头华为周一宣布了一种新的芯片设计方法，可以提高其性能，尽管美国对该公司实施了限制。

items.title: Three signs from APEC that the U.S. and China remain far apart on trade
items.summary: U.S. and Chinese officials have met and spoken publicly about differing priorities since the Trump-Xi summit concluded in Beijing last week.
items.title_zh: APEC的三个迹象表明美国和中国在贸易上仍然存在很大分歧
items.summary_zh: 自特习会上周在北京结束以来，美国和中国官员多次会面并公开谈论不同的优先事项。

items.title: Which company will the U.S. government take a stake in next? Here’s what traders think
items.summary: After new stakes in quantum companies were revealed, traders on prediction market platform Kalshi think IonQ, Micron and Anduril could be next.
items.title_zh: 美国政府下一步将入股哪家公司？这是交易者的想法
items.summary_zh: 在量子公司的新股份公布后，预测市场平台 Kalshi 的交易员认为 IonQ、Micron 和 Anduril 可能是下一个。

items.title: U.S. pushes its AI in China and Asia after Trump-Xi meeting
items.summary: Integrating American AI in Asia is high on the agenda for the U.S., according to a senior official for APEC and economic policy.
items.title_zh: 特习会后美国将人工智能推向中国和亚洲
items.summary_zh: 一位负责亚太经合组织和经济政策的高级官员表示，将美国人工智能融入亚洲已成为美国议程的重要议题。

items.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
items.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
items.title_zh: 中国呼吁亚太经合组织合作，商务部长因“紧急公务”缺席会议
items.summary_zh: 中国国际贸易代表李成钢表示，他正在主持周五的会议，因为商务部部长王文涛有紧急事务需要处理。

items.title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
items.summary: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.
items.title_zh: 伊朗表示不会立即与美国达成协议
items.summary_zh: 美国国务卿早些时候表示，可能会在周一达成协议。

items.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
items.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.
items.title_zh: 油价下跌因美伊和平协议的希望而下跌
items.summary_zh: 特朗普周六表示，协议将包括重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，但没有透露更多细节。

items.title: White House gunman had previous run-ins with Secret Service, court documents show
items.summary: The suspect previously obstructed a White House entry lane in June of 2025 and told Secret Service agents he was Jesus Christ.
items.title_zh: 法庭文件显示，白宫枪手此前曾与特勤局发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 嫌疑人此前曾于 2025 年 6 月堵塞白宫入口通道，并告诉特勤局特工他是耶稣基督。

items.title: Three killed in Uganda after crashing into elephant
items.summary: Four people were also injured in the incident inside Murchison Falls National Park, officials say.
items.title_zh: 乌干达三人撞大象身亡
items.summary_zh: 官员称，默奇森瀑布国家公园内的事件还造成四人受伤。

items.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
items.summary: A hypersonic missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模袭击，造成四人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯证实，使用了据称飞行速度超过音速十倍的高超音速导弹。

items.title: At least 19 people taken to hospital after 'strong smell' reported at Tokyo mall
items.summary: Police say a man sprayed a substance at an ATM in the luxury Ginza 6 shopping centre.
items.title_zh: 东京商场传出“强烈气味” 至少19人被送往医院
items.summary_zh: 警方称，一名男子在豪华的银座 6 购物中心的自动取款机上喷洒了一种物质。

items.title: Anger grows after China's deadliest coal mining disaster in years
items.summary: On China's tightly-controlled internet, people are calling for justice and questioning how this happened.
items.title_zh: 中国多年来最严重的煤矿灾难引发愤怒情绪
items.summary_zh: 在中国严格控制的互联网上，人们呼吁正义并质疑这是如何发生的。

items.title: Clashes as Venezuelan prisoners protest over alleged mistreatment
items.summary: The prisoners insisted their protest was peaceful but that security forces deployed to quell it opened fire.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉囚犯因涉嫌虐待而发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 囚犯们坚称他们的抗议是和平的，但部署的安全部队却开枪镇压。

items.title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
items.summary: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.
items.title_zh: 领导人被罢黜后土耳其防暴警察冲进反对派办公室
items.summary_zh: 在该党发誓要无视法院罢免其领导人的裁决几天后，警察强行闯入大楼。

items.title: A City in the Kill Zone
items.summary: Little is left of Kostiantynivka, a city on the front lines. Rescuers risk their lives to ferry out the few who remain.
items.title_zh: 杀戮地带的城市
items.summary_zh: 前线城市科斯蒂安蒂尼夫卡已所剩无几。救援人员冒着生命危险救出仅存的少数人。

items.title: How Wine, Truffles and Honey Could Help Europe Fight Wildfires
items.summary: Countries are learning that the finer things in life sometimes have a serendipitous side benefit.
items.title_zh: 葡萄酒、松露和蜂蜜如何帮助欧洲扑灭野火
items.summary_zh: 各国正在认识到，生活中美好的事物有时会带来偶然的附带好处。

items.title: In Ukraine, a Divisive 20th-Century Hero Comes Home
items.summary: Andriy Melnyk, criticized as a Nazi collaborator and lionized as an anti-Soviet resistance leader, was given state honors for his reburial near Kyiv.
items.title_zh: 在乌克兰，一位分裂的 20 世纪英雄回家
items.summary_zh: 安德烈·梅尔尼克（Andriy Melnyk）被批评为纳粹合作者，并被誉为反苏抵抗运动领袖，因在基辅附近重新安葬而获得国家荣誉。

items.title: In City at Center of Ebola Crisis, ‘the Virus Is Far Ahead of Us’
items.summary: The deadly virus has spread alarmingly in Congo for months. Only now is the response taking shape.
items.title_zh: 在埃博拉危机中心城市，“病毒远远领先于我们”
items.summary_zh: 几个月来，这种致命病毒在刚果的传播速度令人担忧。直到现在，应对措施才初具规模。

items.title: Pope Leo Has Released an Encyclical About A.I. Why Is That Important?
items.summary: Leo XIV issued his thoughts about artificial intelligence in the modern world using a centuries-old form of papal communication called an encyclical.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥发布了关于人工智能的通谕为什么这很重要？
items.summary_zh: 利奥十四世使用具有数百年历史的教皇通谕形式发表了他对现代世界人工​​智能的看法。

items.title: How a Curious FIFA Deal Gave Fox a Huge Bargain for World Cup Broadcast Rights
items.summary: A decision to stave off litigation between Fox and FIFA turned into a bonanza worth hundreds of millions of dollars in discounted World Cup rights to the broadcaster.
items.title_zh: 国际足联的一项奇怪协议如何为福克斯赢得了世界杯转播权的巨额交易
items.summary_zh: 福克斯和国际足联之间避免诉讼的决定为该广播公司带来了价值数亿美元的世界杯折扣转播权的巨额财富。

items.title: Prometheum bets Wall Street distribution is the missing link for tokenized securities
items.summary: Crypto has solved tokenization, but not distribution and Prometheum says broker-dealers and RIAs are the key to bringing digital assets into mainstream finance.
items.title_zh: Prometheum 押注华尔街发行是代币化证券缺失的一环
items.summary_zh: 加密货币已经解决了代币化问题，但没有解决分配问题，Prometheum 表示，经纪交易商和 RIA 是将数字资产带入主流金融的关键。

items.title: Hyperliquid is emerging as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets, says FalconX
items.summary: A new report shows Hyperliquid is rapidly expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets, prediction contracts, and 24/7 asset trading, putting Wall Street giants on high alert.
items.title_zh: FalconX 表示，Hyperliquid 正在成为传统交易所和预测市场的挑战者
items.summary_zh: 一份新报告显示，Hyperliquid 正在迅速从加密领域扩展到 IPO 前市场、预测合约和 24/7 资产交易，这让华尔街巨头处于高度戒备状态。

items.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
items.summary: A Coinbase executive called on regulators to implement sensible crypto regulation, while announcing the Stand With Crypto event taking place in over 500 locations worldwide.
items.title_zh: 交易所高管表示，Coinbase 并不担心来自华尔街的竞争
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 的一位高管呼吁监管机构实施明智的加密货币监管，同时宣布在全球 500 多个地点举办“Stand With Crypto”活动。

items.title: ‘We don’t know who deployed this’: Squid distances itself from $3.2 million third-party module exploit
items.summary: Squid said its core protocol was unaffected after a third-party module named SquidRouterModule was exploited for roughly $3.2 million.
items.title_zh: “我们不知道是谁部署了这个”：Squid 与价值 320 万美元的第三方模块漏洞保持距离
items.summary_zh: Squid 表示，在名为 SquidRouterModule 的第三方模块被利用后，其核心协议并未受到影响，损失约为 320 万美元。

items.title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket amid crackdown on online betting
items.summary: Indonesia blocked Polymarket over online gambling concerns as regulators widen global scrutiny of prediction market platforms.
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚因打击在线博彩而封锁 Polymarket
items.summary_zh: 随着监管机构扩大对预测市场平台的全球审查​​，印度尼西亚因在线赌博问题而封锁了 Polymarket。

items.title: StablR’s EURR and USDR depeg after attacker mints $13.5 million in unbacked tokens through multisig exploit
items.summary: EURR fell to $0.85 and USDR fell as low as $0.40 after an attacker dumped roughly $10.4 million in face value on decentralized exchanges.
items.title_zh: 在攻击者通过多重签名漏洞铸造 1350 万美元无支持代币后，StablR 的欧元和美元脱钩
items.summary_zh: 在攻击者在去中心化交易所倾销约 1040 万美元面值后，欧元跌至 0.85 美元，美元跌至 0.40 美元。

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 被 Gartner 评为企业编码代理领域的领导者
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 在 2026 年 Gartner 企业 AI 编码代理魔力象限中被评为领导者，Codex 因创新和企业规模部署而获得认可。

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.summary: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.
items.title_zh: 维珍航空如何利用 Codex 加快运输速度
items.summary_zh: 维珍航空如何使用 Codex 在固定的假日旅行截止日期内发布其改进的移动应用程序，实现接近全部单元测试覆盖率和零 P1 缺陷。

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
items.title_zh: AdventHealth 利用 OpenAI 推进全人护理
items.summary_zh: AdventHealth 正在使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 来简化工作流程、减轻管理负担，并将更多时间用于患者护理。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作为所有公民带来 ChatGPT Plus
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作扩大人工智能的使用范围，提供 ChatGPT Plus 和培训，帮助公民培养实用的人工智能技能并负责任地使用人工智能。

items.title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
items.title_zh: 值得正确使用的工具、脚手架和人工智能代理术语

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
items.summary: A recap of the 2026 I/O Dialogues, where leaders discuss the future of AI, quantum computing, robotics and creativity.
items.title_zh: 赶上 Google I/O 2026 的对话舞台。
items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 今年，在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们发布了 Gemini Omni、Google Antigravity、Universal Cart 等等。以下是亮点。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
